privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for ardour_env audio_region_editing task by confirming that the prerequisite audio recordings are real human speech samples (e.g., from Librivox) downloaded via install_ardour.sh. Explicit editing parameters (splits at 5.0s/220500 and 20.0s/882000, sample rate 44100 Hz, track name 'Bumper', export path '/home/ga/Audio/bumper_export/kpub_bumper.wav') were explicitly verified against the setup script instructions. Discovered a critical defect: the 'verifier.py' script is completely missing from the task environment, rendering the task unscorable.
